sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id int, name string, value bigint);
CREATE FUNCTION add_value(a bigint, b bigint) RETURNS bigint BEGIN RETURN a + b; END;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', add_value(2, 3));
UPDATE test_table SET value = add_value(value, 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT name, add_value(value, 10) AS updated_value FROM test_table;
